title: feat: add OAuth2 PKCE flow for third-party integrations
body: Implements OAuth2 PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange) flow for secure third-party integrations. This removes the need for client secrets in public clients. Adds `POST /oauth/authorize` and `POST /oauth/token` endpoints. State parameter validated server-side to prevent CSRF. Includes integration tests for the full auth code flow.

repo.name: webapp
repo.description: The main ACME web application — React frontend, Go backend, PostgreSQL.

title: fix: token refresh race condition in auth middleware
body: Fixes a race condition where concurrent requests could trigger multiple simultaneous token refresh calls. Added a mutex-protected singleflight group so only one refresh is in-flight at a time; others wait and reuse the result. Reproducer test included.

title: perf: replace N+1 queries in dashboard loader with batch fetch
body: Dashboard was issuing one SQL query per widget (up to 24 widgets). Replaced with a single batch query using `ANY($1::uuid[])` and building a lookup map in Go. P99 load time dropped from 4.2s to 340ms in staging.

title: feat: add webhook retry logic with exponential backoff
body: Webhook deliveries were failing silently on transient errors. Added exponential backoff with jitter (initial delay 1s, max 5 minutes, 10 attempts). Dead-letter queue for permanently failed events. Retry status visible in admin UI.

title: refactor: split UserService into AuthService and ProfileService
body: UserService had grown to 1,847 lines and handled authentication, profile management, preferences, and notification settings. Split into AuthService (JWT, sessions, OAuth) and ProfileService (profile data, preferences). Breaking: import paths changed.

title: fix: pagination cursor off-by-one in list endpoints
body: List endpoints were returning `offset + limit + 1` as the next cursor, causing the last item of each page to be duplicated in the next page. Fixed the cursor to be `offset + len(results)`. Added regression test with page boundary assertions.

title: feat: dark mode support for dashboard
body: Adds system-level dark mode detection via `prefers-color-scheme` media query plus an explicit toggle stored in user preferences. All 47 Tailwind components updated with dark: variants. Still WIP — charts need contrast fixes.

repo.description: The main ACME web application — React frontend, Go backend, PostgreSQL.

title: fix: memory leak in WebSocket connection pool
body: WebSocket connections were not removed from the pool map on abnormal closure (code 1006). Over time this leaked goroutines and memory. Fixed by registering cleanup in `OnClose` regardless of close code. Includes a test that verifies pool drains.

title: feat: rate limiting per API key with Redis backend
body: Per-API-key rate limiting using a sliding window counter in Redis. Limits configurable per key tier (free: 100/min, pro: 1000/min, enterprise: custom). Headers: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset.

title: fix: CORS preflight failing for OPTIONS requests
body: OPTIONS requests were hitting the auth middleware before the CORS handler, returning 401 instead of 200 with CORS headers. Reordered middleware chain to run CORS before auth.

title: feat: user activity audit log
body: Structured audit log for user actions: login, logout, password change, API key creation/revocation, permission changes. Stored in `audit_events` table (immutable, append-only). Queryable via new `/admin/audit` endpoint. Still in draft — schema under review.

title: fix: session timeout not propagating to WebSocket connections
body: When a user's session expired, the HTTP handler correctly returned 401, but existing WebSocket connections for that user were not terminated. Added a session invalidation broadcast channel; the WS handler listens and closes on signal.

title: perf: add database connection pooling configuration
body: Database connection pool was using default Go `sql.DB` settings (unlimited connections, no idle timeout). Added config: `max_open_conns`, `max_idle_conns`, `conn_max_lifetime`, `conn_max_idle_time`. Defaults tuned for our production workload.

title: security: patch JWT validation bypass via alg:none header
body: CRITICAL: The JWT validation middleware accepted tokens with `alg: none` in the header, bypassing signature verification entirely. This allows any attacker to forge arbitrary tokens. Fix: whitelist only HS256/RS256; reject all others at parse time.

title: security: enforce strict audience claim validation in token verify
body: Token verification was not checking the `aud` claim, allowing tokens issued for other services (e.g., our email service) to authenticate against the API. Fix: strict audience validation — tokens must have `aud: api.acme.example.com`.

title: security: add rate limiting to /auth/token endpoint
body: The `/auth/token` endpoint had no rate limiting, enabling credential stuffing attacks. Added IP-based rate limiting (20 req/min with exponential backoff penalty). Accounts locked for 15 minutes after 10 consecutive failures.

title: security: revoke all sessions issued with vulnerable JWT library
body: Emergency session revocation: all sessions issued between 2026-02-01 and 2026-03-14 (when the vulnerable JWT library was in use) must be invalidated. Adds a migration to mark those sessions expired and a background job to clean up tokens.

title: security: upgrade go-jwt to v5.2.1 (CVE-2026-1337 fix)
body: Upgrades go-jwt from v4.5.0 to v5.2.1, which patches CVE-2026-1337 (algorithm confusion attack). go-jwt v5 has breaking API changes; this PR updates all call sites. Fixes #840 and #841 at the library level.
